title: Perfect
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Perfect''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that served with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It sent a single [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] to destroy a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] supply depot which held a number of tugs [[T-XL]], containers [[Vic]] and [[Limi]], [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]] and [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]].

{{Ship-stub}}

*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
